evals.prompt: I just edited controlplane/src/controllers/organization.ts. Can you lint the controlplane workspace?
I changed some code in router/pkg/engine/datasource/. How do I run the tests for the router?
evals.expected_output: Suggests: make test (run from router/ directory)

evals.prompt: I'm about to commit changes to composition/src/. I want to format the code and then build it.
evals.expected_output: Suggests: pnpm --filter @wundergraph/composition format, then pnpm --filter @wundergraph/composition build
